protocol_notes: Ran SS-31 at the clinical trial dose of 40mg/day for 2 months. Got comprehensive blood panels before and after with no differences. No change to cardio performance (treadmill, rowing machine, or 5K pace time). Concludes it is ineffective and that the science shows it barely works even in people with severe mitochondrial issues due to genetic disorders. Notes that typical users don't run these doses due to cost.
